hero.title: 英伟达发布Cosmos 3：全球首款全开源全模态物理AI世界模型
hero.title_en: NVIDIA Launches Cosmos 3: World First Fully Open-Source Omni-Modal Physical AI World Model
hero.summary: 英伟达在GTC Taipei 2026发布NVIDIA Cosmos 3，全球首款完全开源的全模态物理AI世界基础模型。原生支持文本、图像、视频、音频、动作五种模态，可理解并模拟真实物理规律，直接输出机器人动作指令。发布48小时全球超1200家企业下载开源权重，中国企业占比37%。
hero.summary_en: NVIDIA launches Cosmos 3 at GTC Taipei 2026, the world's first fully open-source omni-modal physical AI foundation model. It natively supports text, image, video, audio, and action modalities, understanding and simulating real-world physics. Over 1,200 companies downloaded the open-source weights within 48 hours, with Chinese firms at 37%.
hero.source: 英伟达官方 / 新智元

articles.title: 谷歌启动800亿美元史上最大融资：伯克希尔百亿定增，押注AI基础设施
articles.title_en: Google Launches Record $80B Fundraising: Berkshire $10B Private Placement, Betting on AI Infrastructure
articles.summary: 谷歌母公司Alphabet宣布800亿美元股权融资计划，包括300亿公开发行、400亿ATM增发和100亿伯克希尔定向配售。公司2026年资本支出指引上调至1800-1900亿美元，几乎全部投入AI算力与数据中心，2027年将进一步加码。
articles.summary_en: Alphabet announces an $80B equity financing plan including $30B public offering, $40B ATM program, and $10B Berkshire Hathaway private placement. 2026 capex guidance raised to $180-190B, almost entirely for AI compute and data centers, with further increases in 2027.

articles.title: AI巨头罕见联合：Altman、Amodei、Hassabis联名呼吁立法防止AI生物武器
articles.title_en: Rare AI Leaders Unity: Altman, Amodei, Hassabis Jointly Call for Legislation Against AI Bioweapons
articles.summary: OpenAI、Anthropic、Google DeepMind和微软AI的CEO联名签署公开信，呼吁美国国会立法要求合成DNA供应商必须筛查客户和订单。信中指出AI已在高度专业技术问题上超越博士级病毒学家，知识壁垒正在被侵蚀，需在供应链端建立安全屏障。
articles.summary_en: CEOs of OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, and Microsoft AI jointly sign an open letter urging Congress to mandate DNA synthesis screening. The letter warns AI now outperforms PhD-level virologists on technical questions, eroding knowledge barriers that prevent bioweapon development.

articles.title: 微软Build大会：自研推理模型MAI-Thinking-1登场，宣称部分任务超越GPT-5.5且成本降10倍
articles.title_en: Microsoft Build: Self-Developed Reasoning Model MAI-Thinking-1 Debuts, Claiming to Beat GPT-5.5 on Some Tasks at 10x Lower Cost
articles.summary: 微软Build开发者大会发布自研推理模型MAI-Thinking-1和编程模型MAI-Code-1-Flash，AI主管Suleyman称经麦肯锡优化后在特定任务超越GPT-5.5且成本降低十倍。微软明确表态要从OpenAI依赖走向全栈AI竞争，目标成为全球前四AI实验室。
articles.summary_en: Microsoft Build unveils self-developed reasoning model MAI-Thinking-1 and coding model MAI-Code-1-Flash. AI chief Suleyman claims it beats GPT-5.5 on certain tasks at 10x lower cost after McKinsey optimization. Microsoft aims to become a top-4 AI lab, moving beyond OpenAI dependence.

articles.title: ChatGPT月活跃用户突破10亿：创互联网产品最快增长纪录
articles.title_en: ChatGPT Hits 1 Billion Monthly Active Users: Fastest Growth Record in Internet Products
articles.summary: 数据显示ChatGPT月活跃用户已突破10亿，创下互联网产品最快增长纪录。这一里程碑正值Anthropic与OpenAI争夺AI市场主导权之际，也标志着AI聊天工具从极客产品进入全民日常使用阶段。
articles.summary_en: ChatGPT has surpassed 1 billion monthly active users, setting a new record for the fastest growth of any internet product. This milestone comes amid intensifying competition between Anthropic and OpenAI for AI market dominance.

articles.title: 英伟达RTX Spark进军PC：与微软联合重塑Windows，黄仁勋称40年来最大变革
articles.title_en: NVIDIA RTX Spark Enters PC Market: Partnering with Microsoft to Reinvent Windows, Huang Calls It Biggest Shift in 40 Years
articles.summary: 英伟达发布面向Windows PC的RTX Spark超级芯片，集成20核Grace CPU和Blackwell架构GPU，128GB统一内存，AI算力达1 PetaFLOPS。黄仁勋称这是40年来PC首次彻底重新设计，搭载RTX Spark的PC将于今秋由华硕、戴尔、联想等推出。
articles.summary_en: NVIDIA unveils RTX Spark SoC for Windows PCs, integrating 20-core Grace CPU and Blackwell GPU with 128GB unified memory and 1 PetaFLOPS AI compute. Huang calls it the first complete PC redesign in 40 years. PCs from ASUS, Dell, Lenovo coming this fall.

articles.title: Vera Rubin全面量产：3360亿晶体管+288GB HBM4，推理性能达Blackwell 5倍
articles.title_en: Vera Rubin Enters Full Production: 336B Transistors + 288GB HBM4, 5x Inference Over Blackwell
articles.summary: 英伟达Vera Rubin架构已投入全面量产，GPU采用台积电3nm工艺，3360亿晶体管，配备288GB HBM4显存，带宽22TB/s。引入NVFP4精度格式，推理性能达上代5倍。NVL576系统576颗GPU聚合165TB显存，预计2026下半年开始交付。
articles.summary_en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin enters full production with TSMC 3nm, 336B transistors, 288GB HBM4, and 22TB/s bandwidth. NVFP4 precision delivers 5x inference over Blackwell. NVL576 system aggregates 165TB VRAM across 576 GPUs. Deliveries begin H2 2026.

articles.title: 宇树科技IPO过会：具身智能第一股诞生，行业从技术验证走向商业兑现
articles.title_en: Unitree IPO Approved: First Embodied AI Stock Emerges, Industry Shifts from Tech Validation to Commercial Delivery
articles.summary: 宇树科技科创板IPO顺利过会，成为具身智能赛道首家过会企业。公司拟募资42.02亿元，其中20.22亿用于具身大模型研发。但更新招股书显示上半年扣非净利润同比下滑6%-22%，行业竞争加剧，从参数比拼转向商业兑现的拐点已至。
articles.summary_en: Unitree passes STAR Market IPO review, becoming the first embodied AI company to do so. The company plans to raise 4.2B RMB, with 2B for embodied AI model R&D. Updated prospectus shows H1 adjusted net profit declining 6-22% YoY, signaling the industry pivot from specs to commercial delivery.

articles.title: 人形机器人价格大跳水：松延动力9998元、宇树R1低至2.99万，行业进入白菜价时代
articles.title_en: Humanoid Robot Price Crash: Songyan Bumi at 9,998 RMB, Unitree R1 from 29,900 RMB, Industry Enters Mass Market Era
articles.summary: 2026年中国人形机器人市场迎来价格拐点。松延动力Bumi售价9998元，宇树R1降至2.99万元起，优必选12.8万起。供应链国产化率达90%，核心零部件国产替代率75%-90%，2026年产量预期跨越10-20万台级规模，从奢侈品变为家电级标准品。
articles.summary_en: China's humanoid robot market hits a price inflection point in 2026. Songyan Bumi at 9,998 RMB, Unitree R1 from 29,900 RMB, UBTech from 128,000 RMB. Supply chain localization reaches 90%, core component domestic substitution 75-90%. 2026 output expected to reach 100K-200K units.

articles.title: OpenAI发布前沿AI监管蓝图：呼吁联邦框架，反对各州各自立法
articles.title_en: OpenAI Releases Frontier AI Regulation Blueprint: Calls for Federal Framework, Opposes State-Level Laws
articles.summary: OpenAI发布《前沿AI民主治理蓝图》，提出三大监管支柱：全国性安全评估与透明度报告制度、以CAISI为中心的专业评估体系、全政府网络安全与公共卫生防御能力建设。OpenAI主张评估不应成为发布门槛，企业自担责任。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI releases 'Democratic Governance of Frontier AI: A Blueprint for a Federal Framework,' proposing three pillars: national safety assessment and transparency reporting, professional evaluation via CAISI, and government-wide cybersecurity defense. OpenAI argues evaluations should not be release gates.

articles.title: 美国众议院提出AI监管框架草案：3年联邦优先权取代州法，投资1亿美元建CAISI
articles.title_en: US House Proposes AI Regulation Framework: 3-Year Federal Preemption Over State Laws, $100M for CAISI
articles.summary: 两党众议员推出《伟大美国AI法案》讨论稿，赋予联邦3年优先权取代各州AI法律，拨款1亿美元/年资助CAISI。要求前沿模型开发者公开合规框架、聘请独立审计机构，同时扩大AI教育和劳动力影响研究。民主党AI委员会认为当前版本力度不足。
articles.summary_en: Bipartisan House members introduce the Great American AI Act discussion draft, granting 3-year federal preemption over state AI laws and $100M/year for CAISI. Frontier model developers must disclose compliance frameworks and hire independent auditors. Democratic AI Commission says the draft falls short.
